name: Peach Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix cream cheese, sugar, milk, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Place pie shell in a baking dish and pour filling into the shell.
5. Arrange sliced peaches on top of the filling.
6. Sprinkle cornstarch mixture over the peaches.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until set.
8. Let cool before serving.
